positive: Stylized symmetrical depiction of a bioluminescent celestial forest. Intricate pattern work featuring crystalline flora, glowing nebulae, and intertwined crescent moons, rendered in clean geometric line art. The composition must be centrally balanced and high contrast, using a limited color palette of deep indigo, teal, shimmering silver, and electric violet. Strong emphasis on clean silhouettes and negative space, perfect for apparel transfer. Full composition, highly detailed, vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, illuminated by ethereal, soft light.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, brand name, dirty, smudged, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, out of frame, cropped
